name: management consulting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For management consulting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, inaccurate billing reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation of billing records and time tracking.
problem_solved: Inaccurate billing reconciliation leading to cash flow gaps.
